Only key issues affecting pickup to yard
Fast sell, average, slow sell, salvage risk

Low-hour or exceptionally maintained unit. Clean, fully functional, strong cosmetics, no material leaks, no immediate repairs expected.

description: Normal used condition for age/hours. Fully operational with minor wear, minor cosmetic flaws, and no major immediate repair needed.
notes: Score meaning

description: Operational but shows meaningful wear. Multiple defects or deferred maintenance present. Marketability reduced and buyer likely expects repairs.
notes: Score meaning

description: Runs or partially functions but has major defects, structural concerns, heavy leakage, significant wear, or failed systems. Strong value discount.
notes: Score meaning

description: Non-running or unable to demonstrate critical functions. Salvage, parts, or major project unit unless repaired.
notes: Score meaning

description: Tech could not inspect or confirm. Use sparingly and explain why.
notes: Score meaning
